title: Companions & Constructs
description: Forge your path through a world of legends, creatures, and contraptions. Build, battle, and explore in the ultimate adventure-packed modded experience!
body: ![companions and constructs logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b8257e7a9469f6618670bf5c7c29efc3cf84732.png) --- _This modpack is under development, there may be some issues!_ Please don't hesitate to let us know! --- --- Embark on an epic journey through a world teeming with adventure, creativity, and mystery. In this fabric modpack, you’ll find a perfect blend of automation, exploration, and companionship: - **Automate Your World**: With the Create Mod, design sprawling factories, intricate contraptions, and ingenious machines to help you thrive in this dynamic world. - **Catch and Battle**: Build your team with the Cobblemon Mod, capturing adorable creatures, training them, and battling in thrilling matches. - **Legendary Exploration**: Discover ancient structures, tools, and treasures, adding a mythical touch to your adventure. - **Mystical Trinkets**: Equip powerful artefacts and trinkets to gain unique abilities and enhance your play style. - **Companions and Critters**: Populate your world with charming passive mobs, companions and Cobblemon. - **Customised Gameplay**: Enjoy personalized tweaks and enhancements that refine and elevate your experience. Whether you're building, battling, or exploring, Companions & Constructs promises countless hours of fun, creativity, and discovery. Gather your companions, master your machines, and uncover the secrets of this enchanting world!
